popularStory.headline: DONALD, LORD OF THE ISLES; AND MARGARET LESLIE, Tenth Countess of Ross.
popularStory.description: Lady Margaret Leslie, daughter of Walter Leslie, Earl of Ross, by his wife Euphemia, Countess of Ross, married Donald, Lord of the Isles. When Lady Margaret's niece, Euphemia, Countess of Ross, daug …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mariota Leslie於1363年出生在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾萊斯利時，她的父親Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross54歲，母親Euphemia Countess of Ross15歲。她於1395年10月8日與Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles在蘇格蘭洛-爾丁瓦爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1429年在蘇格蘭洛-爾丁瓦爾享年66歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭洛-爾福特洛斯福特洛斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mariota Leslie于1363年出生在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾萊斯利时，她的父亲Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross54岁，母亲Euphemia Countess of Ross15岁。她于1395年10月8日与Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles在苏格兰洛-爾丁瓦爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1429年在苏格兰洛-爾丁瓦爾享年66岁，埋葬在苏格兰洛-爾福特洛斯福特洛斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Leslie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a barony in Aberdeenshire, which is first recorded c. 1180 in the form Lesslyn, of obscure origin. Leslie in Fife is said to be named for this place; in some cases the surname may come from there.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Lecelin, a double diminutive of Lece. See Leece and Lesley .

History: The Scottish Clan Leslie claims descent from Bartolf, a Hungarian nobleman who came to Scotland in 1068 or 1070 in the retinue of Queen Margaret. She was an English princess who had been born and brought up in Hungary and who went on to marry King Malcolm III of Scotland. Members of the clan have held several titles in the peerage of Scotland, including Earl of Rothes (from 1437).

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Lesley
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Leslie  .

nameMeanings.name: Mariota
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Mariota Leslie was born in 1363, in Leslie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, her father, Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross, was 54 and her mother, Euphemia Countess of Ross, was 15. She married Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles on 8 October 1395, in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1429, in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, at the age of 66, and was buried in Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mariota Leslie est née en 1363, à Leslie, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, son père, Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Euphemia Countess of Ross, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles le 8 octobre 1395, à Dingwall, Ross-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1429, à Dingwall, Ross-shire, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mariota Leslie 1363 in Leslie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross 54 und ihre Mutter Euphemia Countess of Ross 15. Sie hat am 8. Oktober 1395 in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1429 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland und wurde in Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mariota Leslie è nata il nel 1363 nel Leslie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, sua padre, Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Euphemia Countess of Ross, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles il 8 ottobre 1395, nel Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Mariota Leslieが1363年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアレスリーで生まれた時，父Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Rossは54歳，母Euphemia Countess of Rossは15歳であった。1395年10月8日にスコットランドロス-シュアイアディングワルでDonald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Islesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1429年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアディングワルで66歳で死去し，スコットランドロス-シュアイアフォートローゼフォートローゼ カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mariota Leslie(이)가 1363년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 레슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Euphemia Countess of Ross(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1395년 10월 8일 스컷랜드 로스-실르 딩월에서 Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1429년 스컷랜드 로스-실르 딩월에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 로스-실르 포트로즈 포트로즈 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mariota Leslie nasceu em 1363, em Leslie, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, seu pai, Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Euphemia Countess of Ross, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles em 8 de outubro de 1395, em Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1429, em Dingwall, Ross-shire, Scotland, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Fortrose Cathedral, Fortrose, Ross-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mariota Leslie родилась в 1363 г. в местности лесли, абирдиншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Lord Walter Leslie 7th Earl of Ross было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Euphemia Countess of Ross, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Donald MacDonald 8th Lord of the Isles 8 октября 1395 г. в местности дингвалл, росс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1429 г. в местности дингвалл, росс-шир, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности фортрос кэтедраль, фортрос, росс-шир, Шотландия.
